notes: Market-neutral monthly XTI/XNG same-calendar-month seasonality basket from the approved KELOHARJU-RETSEAS-2016_XTI_XNG_S01 card. The EA runs from the XTIUSD.DWX D1 host, reconstructs synchronized historical returns for the current calendar month, buys the higher seasonal energy leg, and shorts the lower one. Q02 must evaluate the logical basket, not standalone legs.
